sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Israel-te A Hehpih ding Ngetna

verses.text: Topa aw, nangma leitang na hehpih a, Jakob' nopsaknate a ngeina na bangsakkik hi
Na mite' mawhna na maisak a, amau' khialhna khempeuh na maisak hi
Na hehna khempeuh na damsak a, na sinsona na daisak hi
Kote hong honkhia Pasian aw, kote ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in la, kote tunga na lungkimlohna hong beisak ta in
Kote' tungah heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Khang tawntungin heh paisuak ding na hi hiam
Kote in nangmah kong phat theihna dingun ko na mite hong nungtasakkik loding na hi hiam
Topa aw, kote tungah na itna kip hong lak in la, hong huhin hong hon in
Topa Pasian' thugen ding hong zasak dih un. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama lamah lungsim takpi tawh a kihei ama mi siangtho, ama mite' tungah kilemna thu a gen ding hi
I gam sungah minthan'na a om theihna dingin amah a zahtakte-a' dingin ama hong hotkhiatna hong om takpi hi
Itna kip leh thutak kigawm ding a, thuman leh kilemna kihual ding uh hi
Leilak panin thutak hong pokhia ding a, vantung panin thuman in hong ensuk ding hi
Topa in a hoih nate eite tungah hong pia ding a, i leitang in hauhna piangsak ding hi
Topa' mai-ah thuman na ma pai ding a, ama lampi a bawlkhol ding hi.
